'''竏嗚-ng-th''' ('''kajangath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cablegram|cablegram]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cablegram|cablegram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗚-ng-th
|-
! Lemma
| kajangath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijangath|thijangath]] || [[word:jijangath|jijangath]] || [[word:shijangath|shijangath]] || [[word:kijangath|kijangath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujangath|thuthujangath]] || [[word:jujujangath|jujujangath]] || [[word:shushujangath|shushujangath]] || [[word:kukujangath|kukujangath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujangath|thujangath]] || [[word:jujangath|jujangath]] || [[word:shujangath|shujangath]] || [[word:kujangath|kujangath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujangath|thujangath]] || [[word:jujangath|jujangath]] || [[word:shujangath|shujangath]] || [[word:kujangath|kujangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejangath|thejangath]] || [[word:jejangath|jejangath]] || [[word:shejangath|shejangath]] || [[word:kejangath|kejangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojangath|thothojangath]] || [[word:jojojangath|jojojangath]] || [[word:shoshojangath|shoshojangath]] || [[word:kokojangath|kokojangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojangath|thojangath]] || [[word:jojangath|jojangath]] || [[word:shojangath|shojangath]] || [[word:kojangath|kojangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojangath|thojangath]] || [[word:jojangath|jojangath]] || [[word:shojangath|shojangath]] || [[word:kojangath|kojangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦjangath|thﾃｦjangath]] || [[word:jﾃｦjangath|jﾃｦjangath]] || [[word:shﾃｦjangath|shﾃｦjangath]] || [[word:kﾃｦjangath|kﾃｦjangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajangath|thathajangath]] || [[word:jajajangath|jajajangath]] || [[word:shashajangath|shashajangath]] || [[word:kakajangath|kakajangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajangath|thajangath]] || [[word:jajangath|jajangath]] || [[word:shajangath|shajangath]] || [[word:kajangath|kajangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajangath|thajangath]] || [[word:jajangath|jajangath]] || [[word:shajangath|shajangath]] || [[word:kajangath|kajangath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajangath|shajangath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajangath|goshajangath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajangath|gokishajangath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajangathnﾃｼ|shajangathnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajangathnknﾃｼ|goshajangathnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangathnﾃｼ|gokishajangathnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajangathshﾃｫ|shajangathshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajangathnkshﾃｫ|goshajangathnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajangathshﾃｫ|gokishajangathshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangathro|shajangathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangathnkro|goshajangathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangathro|gokishajangathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangathmu|shajangathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangathnkmu|goshajangathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangathmu|gokishajangathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajangathsher|shajangathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajangathnksher|goshajangathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajangathsher|gokishajangathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajangathng|shajangathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajangathnkng|goshajangathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajangathng|gokishajangathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajangathya|shajangathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajangathnkya|goshajangathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajangathya|gokishajangathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajangathyam|shajangathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajangathnkyam|goshajangathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajangathyam|gokishajangathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajangathnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shajangathnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajangathnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshajangathnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajangathnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishajangathnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangathnﾃｼro|shajangathnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangathnknﾃｼro|goshajangathnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangathnﾃｼro|gokishajangathnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangathnﾃｼmu|shajangathnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangathnknﾃｼmu|goshajangathnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangathnﾃｼmu|gokishajangathnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajangathshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shajangathshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajangathnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshajangathnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangathshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishajangathshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangathshﾃｫro|shajangathshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangathnkshﾃｫro|goshajangathnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangathshﾃｫro|gokishajangathshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangathshﾃｫmu|shajangathshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangathnkshﾃｫmu|goshajangathnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangathshﾃｫmu|gokishajangathshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajangathronﾃｼ|shajangathronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajangathnkronﾃｼ|goshajangathnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangathronﾃｼ|gokishajangathronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajangathroshﾃｫ|shajangathroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajangathnkroshﾃｫ|goshajangathnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajangathroshﾃｫ|gokishajangathroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangathromu|shajangathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangathnkromu|goshajangathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangathromu|gokishajangathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajangathmunﾃｼ|shajangathmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajangathnkmunﾃｼ|goshajangathnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangathmunﾃｼ|gokishajangathmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajangathmushﾃｫ|shajangathmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajangathnkmushﾃｫ|goshajangathnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajangathmushﾃｫ|gokishajangathmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangathmuro|shajangathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangathnkmuro|goshajangathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangathmuro|gokishajangathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
